title: Zagga Zach's Ultra Performance Modpack
description: Very simplistic optimisation modpack for very limited PCs with a few QoL adjustments
body:
# About
This is my own personal modpack using a collection of mostly optimisation mods made by other people. I've also added a few QoL mods to make the overall experience a little more enjoyable.
## Specs
**Hardware**

Tested on **VivoBook ASUS Laptop X421DA M413DA** - AMD Ryzen 7 3700U, 8GB RAM, Radeon(TM) RX Vega 10 Graphics

**Software**

Tested on - Minecraft 1.20.4, 2GB RAM Allocated

   
### Mod/Additions List

<details>
<summary>Click here</summary>
  
  Balm - BlayTheNinth

  Clean Tooltips

  Cloth Config API - shedaniel

  Durability Plus - ddeeddii

  Dynamic FPS - julisand665

  Enhanced Block Entities - FoundationGames

  Entity Culling - tr7zw

  Fabric API - modmuss50

  Fabric Language Kotlin - modmuss50

  Fast Better Grass - robotkoer

  FerriteCore - malte 0811

  Forge Config API Port - Fuzs

  Full Brightness - heycronus

  Held Item Tooltips - Fuzs

  ImmediatelyFast - RaphiMC

  Indium - comp500

  Jukebox Custom Disc Fix - eclipseisoffline

  Lithium - jellysquid3

  Mod Menu

  ModernFix - embeddedt

  More Culling - FX

  Mouse Tweaks - YaLTeR

  Puzzles Lib - Fuzs

  Sodium - jellysquid3

  ThreadTweak - getchoo

  YetAnotherConfigLib - isxander

  Your Options Shall Be Respected - shedaniel

  Zoomify - isxander
</details>
